books.title: Mango the Monkey Makes a Friend
books.cover: books/Covers/Cover Page - Mango the Monkey Makes a Friend.png
books.phonicsFocus: M sounds · Short vowels · CVC words · AABB rhyme
books.description: Mango the monkey has plenty of mangoes but no friends — until a clumsy accident and a gentle bear change everything.

books.title: Pip the Penguin Goes to School
books.cover: books/Covers/Cover Page - Pip the Penguin Goes to School.png
books.phonicsFocus: P sounds · Short vowels · CVC words · AABB rhyme
books.description: Pip is nervous about his first day at school — but a new friend and a big warm smile make it the best day ever.

books.title: Luna the Firefly Finds Her Glow
books.cover: books/Covers/Cover Page - Luna the Firefly Finds Her Glow.png
books.phonicsFocus: L sounds · Short vowels · CVC words · AABB rhyme
books.description: Luna is the only firefly who can't glow — but a kind frog and one brave stormy night reveal that her light was inside her all along.
